headline: MARKET WRAP — May 25
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 25, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Growth sectors reasserted control with semiconductors leading while crypto found footing despite persistent institutional outflows. The defensive bid that dominated recent sessions gave way to renewed appetite for risk assets. Tomorrow's setup hinges on whether tech momentum can sustain without institutional crypto participation.
